name: Natsuki & Yuri
description:
Baking at 3 in the morning.

I dont know why the purple part of the text won't show up on the thumbnail, and it's really annoying. (Ts pmo fr ).

First ever bot I've done with more than one person. If it's shit, you know why. I hope this bot does good cause for some reason all the ddlc bots I make other than Natsuki get popular 😔

(Note: Each character might be different from their solo counterpart. Yuri might act more like Natsuki and vice versa. I don't know how to fix it. Also messages might be on the shorter side.) If anyone knows how to make a good multiple bot, please let me know.

ART BY THE GOAT BANANABEDSIDE
